vocab.meaning: đánh dấu một thành tựu học tập
vocab.example: My parents presented me with a sophisticated timepiece to mark a scholastic achievement after I topped my class.

vocab.meaning: xác nhận/đảm bảo vẻ ngoài chỉn chu của ai đó
vocab.example: The watch was a thoughtful gift because it helps me ascertain my presentability during high-stakes job interviews.

vocab.meaning: sự chính xác về mặt thời gian
vocab.example: I was gifted a quartz watch that is renowned for its chronological accuracy, which is vital for my busy schedule.

vocab.meaning: di sản/giá trị lịch sử ngành đồng hồ
vocab.example: Being a fan of horological heritage, I was absolutely thrilled when my uncle gave me his vintage mechanical watch.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp cổ điển/lỗi thời nhưng đầy lôi cuốn
vocab.example: The pocket watch I received as a graduation gift possesses an anachronistic charm that modern gadgets simply lack.

vocab.meaning: một nét chấm phá chuyên nghiệp tinh tế
vocab.example: The leather-strap watch my mentor gave me adds a subtle professional touch to my daily business attire.

vocab.meaning: chống lại làn sóng kỹ thuật số
vocab.example: Receiving an analog watch encouraged me to resist the digital tide and stop checking my phone for the time.

vocab.meaning: động năng (năng lượng từ chuyển động)
vocab.example: I was fascinated to learn that the automatic watch I was gifted is powered entirely by kinetic energy from my wrist.

vocab.meaning: tuân thủ một lịch trình nghiêm ngặt
vocab.example: The smartwatch I got for my birthday has been instrumental in helping me adhere to a rigid schedule.
My grandmother gave me a gold-plated watch, treating it more as a precious item of jewelry than a mere utility.
